title: IShowSpeed plans space livestream after completing world tour goal
summary_full: Popular streamer IShowSpeed revealed his ambitious plan to stream live from space after completing his goal of visiting all the world's countries. Having already traveled to 96 nations, he aims to finish his global tour in the next two to three years. Following this, he intends to embark on an unprecedented journey to space, potentially seeking assistance from Elon Musk.
